user.title: Set up Life Events
user.description:
Life Events tracks birthdays, anniversaries, and custom recurring dates — with countdown sensors, a calendar entity, and built-in notification support.

Press Submit to install, then use the **Configure** button to add your events.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Life Events can be configured.

init.title: Manage Life Events
init.description: You have {count} event(s) configured. Select an event to edit it, or add a new one.

event_form.title: Add / Edit Event
event_form.description: Enter the details for this event. Use YYYY-MM-DD if you know the year, or MM-DD if you only want to track the day (useful for anniversaries where you don't want to show years).

data.name: Name
data.year_unknown: Year unknown (use MM-DD format and hide age/years)
data.notify_days_raw: Notify me (days before) — comma separated, e.g. 0, 7, 14

error.invalid_date: Invalid date. Use YYYY-MM-DD (e.g. 1990-03-15) or MM-DD (e.g. 03-15) if year is unknown.
